sources: CFPB Your Money Your Goals toolkit

emergency_fund.description: 3-6 months of essential living expenses; 9+ months for variable income, self-employed, or single-income households

debt.description: Total Debt-to-Income ratio = total monthly debt payments / gross monthly income. Housing ratio = housing payment only. Consumer debt flag when consumer debt / income > 15%.

savings.description: Savings rate = total annual savings / gross annual income. IRA catch-up applies age >= 50.

insurance.description: Life insurance face amount as multiple of gross annual income. With dependents, 15x recommended. Disability: 60% income replacement target.

retirement.description: 80% income replacement at retirement. 4% safe withdrawal rate (Bengen rule). Real returns net of inflation.

net_worth_targets.description: Target net worth as multiple of gross annual income (Stanley-Danko 'Millionaire Next Door' benchmarks, adjusted)

order: 1. Employer 401k match (free money — always capture first)
4. Max HSA if eligible (triple tax advantage)
planning_priorities.description: General priority stack for cash flow allocation. Individual circumstances may reorder.
